---
title: 'Car Accident Sunday 11/11/2012'
date: '2012-11-18T06:02:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3495535267601773151'
blogger_filename: '/2012/11/car-accident-sunday-11112012.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Car'
  - '2nd Car'
---

Thank you Father for replacing, doubling, and upgrading us to new cars.<br />
Thank you Father, for protecting us from bodily harm. Belongings can be replaced, but we were safe. My pain is now healed. I am SO grateful for your total protection that evening! The devil is a liar and thief. I do not allow him to take from us. I call in new car(s), better cars. Upgrades. In Jesus Name.<br />
<br />
I call this in for Brother Harper too! I call him healed, healthy, whole, and WELL provided for. MUCH better car for him in Jesus name!<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="https://maps.google.com/maps?hl=en&amp;q=fort+worth+hwy+30+hulen&amp;ie=UTF-8&amp;ei=_fOgUN2hIYXu2QWx4oH4BQ&amp;ved=0CAUQ_AUoAA">https://maps.google.com/maps?hl=en&amp;q=fort+worth+hwy+30+hulen&amp;ie=UTF-8&amp;ei=_fOgUN2hIYXu2QWx4oH4BQ&amp;ved=0CAUQ_AUoAA</a>
<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Driving from: Main Event Entertainment, 4801 Citylake
Boulevard East, Fort Worth, TX 76132<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
On route to: Hurst Public Library, Precinct Line Road,
Hurst, TX (To drop off books)<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Heading North Bound on 820 Just before Hwy 30 and Brentwood
Stair Rd. <b>4 Lane Fwy.</b><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Approximately 6.20-6.40pm 11.11.2012. <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
A black pick up carrying bedding was driving in Right middle
lane. A mattress flew off of the pickup and flew through the air and landed in
front of a black sedan driving in the left middle lane. The mattress lodged
itself in the passenger tire of this car and rendered it immovable. The
passengers of this car were a young woman and her 3 or 4 year old daughter. <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
My car, Saturn, was directly behind hers, driving at a safe
distance. I was able to come to a complete stop behind her without impact. We
waited for the other driver to move but she did not. After waiting about 1
minute and not seeing her make any move my wife got out of the car to check on
her safety, and see if she could render assistance by removing her safely from
the vehicle or getting the mattress dislodged. While I was stopped just behind
her about 100-150 feet. Meanwhile traffic on all sides was still blaring past
and not slowing, in several instances cars driving full speed swerved around us
making restarting and changing lanes very difficult. <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
While determining the safest course of action we were
impacted in the rear by a GMC Silver Truck. The rear end of the Saturn
sustained major damage. The rear end was pushed up against the rear drivers
tire making the car undrivable. The front end of the GMC sustain damage also,
causing at the very least a radiator leak and front end damage, but it was
driven away from the scene. The Saturn, although undrivable, has front wheel
drive, so after traffic came to a stop on all lanes I was able to <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Three Police arrived on the scene to corral traffic and get
everyone to safety. The truck, whoâ€™s mattress flew off, stopped for a brief
moment to the side of the road after the Black Sedan was hit by it, but then
fled the scene. The sedan and GMC drove away from the scene, after Police were
able to dislodge the mattress. The Saturn was the only vehicle that required
towing. <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
After cleaning out the Saturn for valuables we were graced
with a ride home by one of the officers. No cuts or bodily damage seems to have
been immediately seen on any of the people involved. The next morning I am a
little sore in the neck and shoulders. The kids do not seem to have any feeling
of pain. It was recommended that we still be checked out as a precaution. <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
State Farm called first thing this morning. They are paying
for the rental car and that should arrive soon. Now we are just praying for a
new car.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Praise God for the safety of all involved. It could have
been much worse but by Godâ€™s grace it was only belongings. We thank God for
having protected all involved and we thank Him in advance for providing all the
resources to replace and remedy the situation. Our God is good! In the name of
Jesus, His servant Darrell Wolfe<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br />
Update, within two weeks we had two debt free cars.<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/side-7cd0177b7b1d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="238" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/side-e2de2bca092b.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br /></div>
